archive_policy: No archive is allowed without explicit user authorization. Before archive authorization, every non-archive task and the residual ledger must be complete, the predecessor archive-only terminals remain pending, and the combined exact-tree proof must be fresh.

run_constraints.authority: explicit user instruction for this apply run
run_constraints.effect: Run and verify the existing blocking mutation profile normally, but do not add mutants, mutation fixtures, profiles, targets, modes, or other mutation-suite or mutation-flow surface area. Tasks that combine semantic work with mutation expansion may complete from the semantic work plus the unchanged existing profile; the excluded expansion is recorded explicitly.

blocking_completion_surfaces: all non-archive tasks complete, with only predecessor archive terminals pending
causal mutation profile complete with zero survivors
complete intended-diff census and reviewed exclusions
